episodes.title: US DOJ Releases Epstein Files Linking Trump to New Allegations | News9
episodes.description:
The U.S. Justice Department has released previously unseen FBI documents from the Jeffrey Epstein investigation, including interviews with a South Carolina woman who alleged sexual assault by Epstein and claims that he introduced her to Donald Trump in the 1980s. The White House, via Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt, has strongly denied the allegations, calling them “completely baseless” and lacking credible evidence. DOJ officials noted that some claims in the files remain unverified and sensational, and the documents were previously withheld due to coding errors.

episodes.title: bill gates apologizes for ties with jeffrey epstein | admits past affairs | News9
episodes.description:
In a candid town hall with Gates Foundation employees, Bill Gates took responsibility for his past interactions with the late financier and convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

According to a Wall Street Journal report, Gates said it was a “huge mistake” to meet Epstein after his prison term and to involve Gates Foundation staff in those meetings. Gates apologized to employees and others affected by his decision.

Documents from the U.S. Department of Justice revealed multiple meetings between Gates and Epstein aimed at discussing philanthropic ventures. Gates also acknowledged two past affairs with Russian women, which Epstein later discovered, clarifying that they did not involve Epstein’s victims.

episodes.title: Epstein files allege Andrew watched girl tortured with electric shocks | What happened?
episodes.description:
Former Prince Andrew, the younger brother of King Charles III, was released from police custody. He was arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office over allegations he sent confidential government documents to Jeffrey Epstein.

Detectives from Thames Valley Police arrested Mountbatten-Windsor on his 66h birthday and questioned him all day. Authorities confirmed that he was released under investigation, meaning he has neither been charged nor exonerated.

episodes.title: Amway Pyramid Scheme: ED Chargesheets Amway India; Alleges Money Laundering, Cheating | MLM
episodes.description:
#amway #pyramidscheme #PMLA #moneylaundering #ED #EDcase #multilevelmarketing 

The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has filed a chargesheet against the direct marketing firm Amway India. The agency claimed that the company generated Rs 4,050 crore by cheating its subscribers. It also said that Amway siphoned off ₹2,859 crores overseas.

Amway started the craze of multi-level marketing in India by enrolling innumerable people under its schemes. The company offered people lucrative commissions on its products while they kept adding members below them in the pyramid. ..............................................................................................
